items.title: Shohei Ohtani Role Changing? 'Everything Should Be on Table,' Per Dave Roberts
items.description: Dodgers manager Dave Roberts said that "everything should be on the table" regarding potentially tweaking Shohei Ohtani's role.

items.title: Patriots Coach Mike Vrabel Seeking Counseling, Will Miss Day 3 of 2026 NFL Draft
items.description: New England Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel is seeking counseling and will not be with the team for Day 3 of the 2026 NFL Draft.
